text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... I wanted to try making a new kind
of chanko, so I came up with a new recipe and
everything!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: No matter where I looked, I couldn't find the main ingredient!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I'm so sad! I'll find it for sure next time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Phew... All that running around has really tired me
out. I think I'm going to take it easy for the rest of
the day.
